name: seeking-space
prompt: Wide shot greenhouse wing interior. Dense tropical plants and vegetation filling frame. Glass walls showing night sky. Young man with dark hair entering from LEFT, stepping into green sanctuary. Humid atmosphere visible, green mist from ventilation. The only place D-Class can breathe without surveillance. Lush, overgrown, hidden. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, mature shading, dramatic lighting, green dark teal color palette, high contrast, cel shading
